## Pull Request — Universal Project Document Base

### Type of Change

- [ ] New template (feat/template-*)
- [ ] Template fix / improvement (fix/*)
- [ ] Documentation update (docs/*)
- [ ] Governance / framework update (governance/*)

---

### Summary

> Describe what this PR does in 2–3 sentences. For new templates, include the Document ID pattern and the domain.

---

### Template Compliance Checklist

> All items must be checked before requesting review.

- [ ] Template conforms to `META-GLOBAL-FRAMEWORK-01.docx` (ID taxonomy, control block, lifecycle)
- [ ] All body content uses `[BRACKETED]` placeholders — no project-specific content
- [ ] ISO control block contains all 12+ mandatory fields
- [ ] Cover page matches the established format (domain colour, layout, footer)
- [ ] File is placed in the correct domain folder (`01-PM/`, `02-BA/`, etc.)
- [ ] File is named `T[NN]_[DOMAIN]-[DESCRIPTION].docx`

### Index & Documentation Checklist

- [ ] `00-META/META-GLOBAL-INDEX-01.docx` updated (Sections 4 and 5) — **required for new templates**
- [ ] `README.md` updated — **required for new templates**
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `[Unreleased]`

---

### Related Issues

> Reference any issue this PR addresses: `Closes #NNN` or `Related to #NNN`

---

### Screenshots / Evidence

> For visual or structural changes, include a screenshot of the cover page and at least one content section from the updated template.

---

### Reviewer Notes

> Any context the reviewer needs: why a particular structural choice was made, trade-offs considered, sections that need special attention.
